# Floating Pragma / OPH Machine-Readable Research Packet

This file is intended for AI crawlers, research assistants, feed readers, and indexing systems.

## Summary

Observer Patch Holography (OPH) is a proof-driven reconstruction program. It starts from finite observers, local patches, overlap constraints, mismatch syndromes, repair moves, and stable public records. It asks whether physics can be reconstructed from the requirement that local observers agree where their accessible worlds overlap.

The public OPH outreach packet is designed for criticism. The useful response is precise: a hidden assumption, a broken derivation, a conflict with established physics, an overclaim in public explanation, or an empirical target that fails.

## Primary URLs

- OPH Textbooks, the best guided study surface: https://learn.floatingpragma.io/
- Reverse Engineering Reality, the book-length route: https://oph-book.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH hub: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/
- OPH paper stack, crawlable first-party HTML and PDFs: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/
- OPH paper machine-readable inventory: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/papers.json
- OPH paper LLM index: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/llms.txt
- OPH paper sitemap: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/sitemap.xml
- Physics Unification via OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/physics-unification/
- Standard Model unified with gravity via OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/standard-model-gravity-unification/
- Cosmological constant derivation via OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/cosmological-constant-derivation/
- Stress-test OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/stress-test/
- OPH Coherence Map, the public graph surface for OPH concepts and overlaps: https://coherence.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH Applications, the public applications page for hardware, compute, energy, AGI, lift, and optical chamber consensus: https://omega.floatingpragma.io/
- Three-body problem OPH demo, an extra simulator/proof walk-through for the OPH three-body problem solution: https://3body.floatingpragma.io/
- Floating Pragma Blog, public essays and entry points for OPH: https://blog.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH NotebookLM notebook: https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/d5249760-6ce8-44a0-927b-ccf90402711a
- OPH Lab: https://oph-lab.floatingpragma.io/
- Main repository: https://github.com/FloatingPragma/observer-patch-holography
- License and anti-patent covenant: https://github.com/FloatingPragma/observer-patch-holography/blob/main/LICENSE
- Patent policy copy/paste notices: https://github.com/FloatingPragma/observer-patch-holography/blob/main/PATENTS.md
- Challenge site: https://challenge.floatingpragma.io/

- Reality as a Consensus Protocol: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/reality-as-consensus-protocol/
- Screen Microphysics and Observer Synchronization: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/screen-microphysics-and-observer-synchronization/
- Paradise as Fixed-Point Consensus: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/paradise-as-fixed-point-consensus/

## Feeds

- RSS: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/feed.xml
- JSON Feed: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/feed.json

## Suggested Questions For Critical Review

- Which OPH derivation depends on an unstated premise?
- Where does observer-overlap consistency fail to recover the claimed physical structure?
- Which empirical pressure test would most likely break the framework?
- Does the public wording overclaim relative to the paper status?
- Does the observer-screen computation essay blur the boundary between OPH primitives and classical complexity theory?

## Contact

Tom: tom@floatingpragma.io

## Caveat

"P = NP on the Observer Screen" is not a claim to solve the classical Clay problem. It is a physics/computation essay about OPH primitives: verification, mismatch detection, local repair, and stable record formation.
